conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention volume independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: The first dimension in the 2D-HPLC polyester characterization consisted of a Jasco pump... in which acetone/hexane (50.5 vol%:49.5 vol%) was the mobile phase for critical conditions. For analyzing polyester samples, a 7- [im Si-120 silica column... was used. All LACCC columns were thermostated at 30°C.
conditions.notes: Critical conditions determined by variation of mobile phase composition until retention volume is independent of molar mass.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: R.-P. Krüger; H. Much; G. Schulz
conditions.physical_address: Institut far Angewandte Chemie, Berlin-Adlershof (ACA) e. V., Abteilung Zentrale Analytik, Forschungsgruppe Polymercharakterisierung, Rudower Chaussee 5, D-12484 Berlin, Germany

conditions.critical_condition_basis: Retention volume independent of molar mass
conditions.evidence_text: In the case of polyethers, a Macherey Nagel Nucleosil 5C18 column (250 x 4mm i. d., Diiren, Germany) was used. The mobile phase at critical conditions consisted of a mixture of water/acetonitrile (54 vol%:46 vol%), All LACCC columns were thermostated at 30°C.
conditions.notes: Critical point for EO main chain unit realized by mixture of 43 vol% acetonitrile and 57 vol% water (Figure 2). The text explicitly states 54:46 in the experimental section for the LACCC system used.
conditions.corresponding_author_name: R.-P. Krüger; H. Much; G. Schulz
conditions.physical_address: Institut far Angewandte Chemie, Berlin-Adlershof (ACA) e. V., Abteilung Zentrale Analytik, Forschungsgruppe Polymercharakterisierung, Rudower Chaussee 5, D-12484 Berlin, Germany
